questionHtml:
A weak base is titrated with a strong acid. Which value of pKb can be estimated from this titration curve?

A.  11.3

B.  9.2

C.  4.8

D.  1.8

meta.title: A weak base is titrated with a strong acid. Which value of pKb can be estimated from this titration curve? A. 11.3 B. 9.2 C. 4.8 D. 1.8
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.1.13—pH curves of different combinations of strong and weak monoprotic acids and bases have characteristic shapes and features. Interpret the general shapes of pH curves for all four combinations of strong and weak acids and bases.
